top.title: Iran steps up claim to control Strait of Hormuz
top.summary: Iran publishes a map claiming "armed forces oversight" across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.

top.title: Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
top.summary: A video showing a far-right Israeli minister taunting activists who were kneeling with their hands tied behind their backs has been widely condemned.

top.title: Russia and China condemn US over indictment of former Cuban leader
top.summary: It comes after the US charged Raúl Castro with murder, the latest move putting pressure on the regime.

top.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
top.summary: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

top.title: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
top.summary: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

top.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
top.summary: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

title.#text: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI
In desperate times, graduates find hope in humiliating tech CEOs
Who gets to own the Luigi Mangione story?
